[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
if this works, merge it and hope we're back to just working ...
LGTM but please explain why it’s needed to revert
I am attempting to make golangci-lint  work in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2867

> LGTM but please explain why it’s needed to revert

because it broke us on prow and our CI is dead

Why did we merge this when it wasn't passing CI?

On Sat, Apr 6, 2019, 10:54 Brent Baude <notifications@github.com> wrote:

> LGTM but please explain why it’s needed to revert
>
> because it broke us on prow and our CI is dead
>
> —
> You are receiving this because your review was requested.
> Reply to this email directly, view it on GitHub

Regardless, I'm with Brent here. If we don't have a fix soon I'm going to
merge the revert so we can unblock PRs

> Why did we merge this when it wasn't passing CI?
>
> On Sat, Apr 6, 2019, 10:54 Brent Baude <notifications@github.com> wrote:

>> LGTM but please explain why it’s needed to revert

>> because it broke us on prow and our CI is dead

>
because chris asked dan to ... i alerted chris to the problem immediately but he went on to PTO
the core issue is the linter has to be setup for the tests we do in openshift containers too. that was not done and i think we should revert until chris is back from pto.

@baude Based on Steve's comments elsewhere - do we want to update the Dockerfiles for ci/prow/lint instead of this? It seems like that's our last blocker on this.

I'm still open to merging this is we need to unblock stuff ASAP.

let's merge.  It is blocking all our PRs.  We can reintroduce golangci-lint when it works.

/lgtm
